hero.subtitle: At Lizza X, we build high-performance digital products. Specialized in native and hybrid mobile development, AI architecture consulting, cloud infrastructure, and tech talent training.

services.title: Our Specialties
services.subtitle: Comprehensive tech solutions designed to expand, connect, and automate your business.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.desc: We build high-performance mobile applications for Android and iOS using the most modern architectures and tools.

software.title: Software & Systems Development
software.desc: We construct fast, secure, and scalable SaaS platforms, corporate portals, and large-scale backend systems.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence Solutions
ai.desc: We integrate autonomous agents, large language models (LLMs), and smart automations into your business workflows.

cloud.title: Cloud & Serverless Architecture
cloud.desc: We design self-scaling cloud infrastructures, high-traffic REST/GraphQL APIs, and automated CI/CD pipelines.
cloud.tech: AWS, Supabase, Serverless Computing, GitHub Actions

academy.title: Lizza Academy & Training
academy.desc: We train engineering teams and individual developers through intensive programs in cutting-edge tech.
academy.tech: Jetpack Compose, Kotlin, Swift, Clean Architecture

devrel.title: DevRel & Community Building
devrel.desc: We help tech companies connect with developers through conferences, technical events, and developer relations strategies.
devrel.tech: DevRel Strategy, Technical Talks, Tech Partnerships

about.title: The Engineer Behind the X
about.subtitle: Gustavo Lizárraga, founder of Lizza X.
about.bio_p1: Hi, I'm Gustavo Lizárraga. I founded Lizza X with a clear mission: to build exceptional software, foster vibrant technology communities, and train the next generation of engineers for the international market.
about.bio_p2: With over 13 years of experience in the mobile development and cloud systems ecosystem, I have worked as a consultant, university professor, international speaker, and online instructor. My approach combines the technical rigor of SOLID principles and clean architecture with the dynamism of Artificial Intelligence and Developer Relations (DevRel) strategies.
about.volunteerSubtitle: My participation and leadership in global technology programs.

experience.title: My Professional Journey
experience.subtitle: Discover the key milestones of my career divided into my three major areas of impact.

devJobs.desc: Technical leadership in designing robust mobile architectures (KMP, Flutter) and integrating generative AI APIs for global clients.
Building high-transaction corporate mobile apps, migrating legacy codebases to Kotlin, and rigorously applying MVVM and Clean Architecture patterns.
Developing enterprise web portals, designing complex relational databases, and automating continuous integration (CI/CD) pipelines.

teachJobs.desc: Creating highly specialized technical online courses on Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Multiplatform, SwiftUI, and Clean Architecture, training over 16,000 students worldwide.
Teaching core Software Engineering subjects, Design Patterns, Object-Oriented Programming, and Advanced Mobile Development.

communityJobs.desc: Producing tutorials, podcasts, and articles about software engineering and AI trends to simplify complex concepts for thousands of developers.
International speaker and organizer of hackathons, local Google Developer Group (GDG) meetups, and technical events in Latin America and the US.

volunteer.desc: Student leadership and open-source culture evangelist within academic institutions, organizing workshops on Git, GitHub, and contribution best practices.
Security advocate focusing on identity management, authentication best practices, and secure user flows through talks and technical workshops.
Organizing and speaking at official Google developer events covering Android, Flutter, Firebase, and Google Cloud Platform.

blog.title: Blog & Publications
blog.subtitle: Articles on software engineering, Artificial Intelligence, teaching, and developer communities.
